title: Single-owner authority and seed boundary
description: Budget Plan and Budget Position are owner-scoped resources. P1 under the trusted local operating-system identity may Read, Create Draft, and explicitly Activate; the AI Agent Host receives only that delegated identity and no independent principal. BUDGET seeds no plans, amounts, permissions, roles, role templates, menus, translations, navigation, or frontend key models; Spend Categories come only from LEDGER, and CHANNELS owns any future presentation seeds.
